description.value:
Your body is adapted for planets that undergo harsh seasonal shifts. These shifts might be slow but severe, like those of Triaxus, or they might take place over timescales faster than a Pact standard year.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Toughness] feat. You treat environmental cold and heat effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on). You can go without food or water for twice as long as a typical creature can go without food or water, and you can go without sunlight for 2 weeks if you're photosynthetic without experiencing ill effects.

Hardy leshies are often photosynthetic.
